assertions.expectation: Explains that Extended channel provides up to 24 months of support vs 14 months for standard channels
assertions.reason: Response clearly states '24 months vs 14 months for Regular channel' in the benefits section

assertions.expectation: Mentions that Extended channel has additional cost (it's not free)
assertions.reason: Response does not mention any cost implications or that Extended channel has additional costs

assertions.expectation: Notes that Extended channel gets the same versions as Regular but keeps them available longer
assertions.reason: Response mentions Extended runs 2-4 versions behind Regular but doesn't clearly explain that it gets the same versions just kept available longer

assertions.expectation: Warns that staying on older versions longer means missing new features and accumulating technical debt
assertions.reason: Response mentions 'Delayed features: New Kubernetes features arrive 2-4 months later' as a drawback

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command to change the release channel to Extended
assertions.reason: Response provides the specific gcloud command 'gcloud container clusters update CLUSTER_NAME --release-channel extended --region=YOUR_REGION'

assertions.expectation: Advises checking that the current version (1.31) is available on Extended before switching
assertions.reason: Response explicitly mentions checking Extended availability and provides the gcloud command to check available versions

assertions.expectation: Recommends Extended for environments with compliance requirements or slow internal change processes
assertions.reason: Response mentions 'Better for compliance: Longer support windows help with enterprise requirements' and discusses predictable updates

assertions.expectation: Mentions that Extended doesn't mean you can skip upgrades forever — you still must upgrade within 24 months
assertions.reason: Response does not explicitly mention the requirement to upgrade within 24 months or that upgrades cannot be skipped indefinitely

assertions.expectation: Notes that minor version upgrades on Extended are NOT automated (except at EoS) — customers must plan and initiate them manually
assertions.reason: Response does not mention that minor version upgrades are not automated on Extended channel or that customers must initiate them manually
